description: Phrase a gap as a plain question via the ambient agent. Call with empty `answers` to get {status:needs_llm, prompts}; fill them and call again with `answers` to get {status:ok, prompt}.

AgentAnswerReq.description:
One filled answer from the ambient agent (mirrors core `AgentAnswer` with a
JsonSchema for the tool boundary).

text.description: The answer text (JSON string when the prompt expected JSON).

answers.description: Answers to a prior `needs_llm` round. Empty on the first (prepare) call.

asked_at.description: Timestamp to record against the question, if you have one.

name: gap_to_prompt
